pom.xml.general_idea: Set Java version property to 11 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this, the project may compile against Java 8 bytecode, failing to utilize Java 11 features or potentially causing runtime issues if Java 11-specific APIs are used.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace Springfox Swagger dependencies with SpringDoc OpenAPI.
pom.xml.why_exists: Springfox is no longer maintained and has compatibility issues with Spring Boot 2.6+ and Java 11. SpringDoc is the recommended replacement.

pom.xml.general_idea: Switch JWT library from io.jsonwebtoken to com.auth0.
pom.xml.why_exists: The previous JWT library (io.jsonwebtoken) may have compatibility issues or security concerns; com.auth0 is a more modern and maintained alternative.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Remove dependency on the deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter class.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.why_exists: WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter is deprecated in Spring Security 5.7+ and removed in Spring Security 6; extending it causes compilation errors or severe deprecation warnings in modern Spring Boot versions.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Replace overridden authenticationManagerBean with a bean method using AuthenticationConfiguration.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.why_exists: The super.authenticationManagerBean() method is no longer available when not extending WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter; the new standard is to inject AuthenticationConfiguration.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Replace protected configure(HttpSecurity) method with a SecurityFilterChain bean.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.why_exists: The configure(HttpSecurity) method is part of the WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter contract; without the adapter, this method is ignored or invalid. The new standard is to define a SecurityFilterChain bean.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Remove globalUserDetails method that configured AuthenticationManagerBuilder.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.why_exists: AuthenticationManagerBuilder is no longer used for configuring user details in the new SecurityFilterChain approach; this method is orphaned and causes compilation errors if it references removed imports or unused builders.
Required for the new authenticationManager bean method signature.
Required for the return type of the new securityFilterChain bean method.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Replace Springfox Swagger 2 imports with OpenAPI 3 (swagger-core v3) imports to align with Spring Boot 2.7+ standards.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.why_exists: Springfox is incompatible with Spring Boot 2.6+ due to changes in Spring MVC path matching; code fails to compile or run without switching to the supported OpenAPI 3 library.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Replace Springfox Docket bean definition with OpenAPI 3 OpenAPI bean definition.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.why_exists: The Docket class from Springfox is no longer available; the application will fail to start if the old bean definition is kept.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Update API info construction to use OpenAPI 3 Info, Contact, and License objects instead of Springfox builders.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.why_exists: Springfox ApiInfo and Contact classes are removed; compilation fails if old classes are used.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Replace io.jsonwebtoken (JJWT) imports with com.auth0.jwt imports to migrate the JWT library.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.why_exists: The io.jsonwebtoken library is removed or incompatible; code must use the new auth0 library to compile.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Replace static security constants with a JwtProperties bean for configuration.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.why_exists: Static constants are removed; code must use the injected properties bean to access configuration values.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Inject JwtProperties via constructor using Lombok.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.why_exists: The class requires configuration values (issuer, secret, expiration) which are now provided via a bean rather than static constants.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Rewrite token generation logic to use Auth0 JWT API instead of JJWT.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.why_exists: JJWT API (Jwts.builder) is no longer available; must use Auth0 JWT.create API.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.after:
return JWT.create()
				.withSubject(username)
				.withIssuer(jwtProperties.getIssuer())
				.withClaim("role", userRole.name())
				.withIssuedAt(new Date())
				.withExpiresAt(new Date(System.currentTimeMillis() + jwtProperties.getExpirationMinute() * 60 * 1000))
				.sign(Algorithm.HMAC256(jwtProperties.getSecretKey().getBytes()));

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Rewrite username extraction to use Auth0 DecodedJWT instead of JJWT Claims.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.why_exists: JJWT Claims class is no longer available; must use Auth0 DecodedJWT.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.before:
final Claims claims = getAllClaimsFromToken(token);
		return claims.getSubject();
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.after:
final DecodedJWT decodedJWT = getDecodedJWT(token);

		return decodedJWT.getSubject();

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Rewrite expiration date extraction to use Auth0 DecodedJWT instead of JJWT Claims.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.why_exists: JJWT Claims class is no longer available; must use Auth0 DecodedJWT.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.before:
final Claims claims = getAllClaimsFromToken(token);
		return claims.getExpiration();
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.after:
final DecodedJWT decodedJWT = getDecodedJWT(token);

		return decodedJWT.getExpiresAt();

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Rewrite token parsing/verification to use Auth0 JWTVerifier instead of JJWT Parser.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.why_exists: JJWT Parser API is no longer available; must use Auth0 JWT.require/verify API.
